allow: Bash(conda run -n security python --version 2>&1)
Bash(conda run -n security pip list 2>&1)
Bash(conda run -n security pip install opencv-python)
Bash(git init && git add . && git commit -m "chore: initialize git repo")
Bash(git add config.yaml src/config.py PROGRESS.md && git commit -m "feat: refactor config for modularity and update config loader")
Bash(git add config.yaml src/config.py PROGRESS.md WORKING.md && git commit -m "feat: refactor config for extractor decoupling and update config loader")
Bash(conda run -n security pip install pytest)
Bash(python src/parser.py)
Bash(python src/video_utils.py)
Bash(git add src/video_utils.py && git commit -m "feat: add video_utils.py with frame sampling prototype")

Bash(git add .claude/settings.local.json CLAUDE.md PROGRESS.md src/config.py .gitignore main.py src/__init__.py src/context_index.py src/extractors/ src/parser.py && git commit -m "feat: setup full project skeleton and .gitignore")
Bash(python src/context_index.py)
Bash(python -m src.context_index)

Bash(git add PROGRESS.md WORKING.md main.py src/context_index.py src/extractors/clip_extractor.py src/extractors/projection.py && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: update progress docs, fix context_index imports, and refactor LinearProjection into CLIPVisualExtractor

- Marked src/context_index.py as implemented and verified in PROGRESS.md and WORKING.md.
- Corrected import statements in src/context_index.py to use absolute imports from src, resolving ModuleNotFoundError when run directly.
- Moved LinearProjection class definition from src/extractors/projection.py directly into src/extractors/clip_extractor.py as per architectural feedback.
- Deleted the now redundant src/extractors/projection.py file.
- Updated main.py to reflect integration of context index building, extractor initialization, and the full feature extraction and saving pipeline loop.
- Ensured .claude/settings.local.json is not included in the commit.
Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(python -m src.extractors.clip_extractor)
Bash(conda run -n security pip install clip)
Bash(conda run -n security pip list)

Bash(conda run -n security python -c "import clip; print\(f'clip module found: {clip.__file__}'\); model, preprocess = clip.load\('ViT-B/32', device='cpu'\); print\('CLIP model loaded successfully'\)")
Bash(conda run -n security python -m src.extractors.clip_extractor)

Bash(git add PROGRESS.md WORKING.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: mark CLIPVisualExtractor as implemented and verified

- Updated PROGRESS.md to mark CLIPVisualExtractor as implemented and verified.
- Updated WORKING.md to mark CLIPVisualExtractor as implemented and verified.
- Removed debug sys.path print statement from src/extractors/clip_extractor.py.
Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(conda run -n security python -m src.video_utils)
Bash(conda run -n security python -m src.extractors.visual_clip.strategy)
Bash(conda run -n security python main.py --config config.yaml)
Bash(git add .)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: 添加日志打印，提升 pipeline 可观测性

在关键模块和 pipeline 中增加了详细的日志输出，以便于跟踪和调试。
- `src/extractors/visual_clip/clip_encoder.py`: 增加模型加载和空帧警告日志。
- `src/extractors/visual_clip/strategy.py`: 增加非说话人上下文视频查找和视频文件缺失警告日志。
- `src/pipeline.py`: 增加处理每个 utterance 的日志。
- `src/saver.py`: 取消了跳过现有文件时的日志注释。

此提交还包含了之前的文件结构重构和相关文件调整。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
